creator: silb@silb.no
text:
Created attachment 166978
SVN diff for upgrading audio/beets from 1.3.16 to 1.3.17

Beets 1.3.17 has been released [1].

A new option has been added for the new AcousticBrainz plugin.

See the attached patch for upgrading the port.

[1] http://docs.beets.io/en/v1.3.17/changelog.html
